query: History of the artificialintelligenceact.eu national implementation plans tracker: how many EU member states classified as Clear (designated both market surveillance and notifying authorities) over time in late 2025 and 2026. What is the trend/rate of member states moving to Clear status?
answer:
I've completed the research on the artificialintelligenceact.eu National Implementation Plans tracker.

## Summary of findings

**The "Clear" count over time:** The tracker's headline figures show only **two published values** across late 2025 and 2026:
- **3 Clear** (labeled "Last update: 19 May 2025") — displayed *unchanged* on every Wayback snapshot from 2 Aug 2025 through 16 Jun 2026
- **9 Clear** (labeled "Last update: 17 June 2026") — the current live value (9 Clear / 12 Partial clarity / 6 Unclear)

**The most important caveat:** This tracker does **not** update its summary counts continuously. It sat frozen at "3 Clear" for over a year, then jumped to "9 Clear" in a single editorial rewrite on **17 June 2026**. So the 3→9 change is a documentation event, not evidence that 6 states became Clear simultaneously — the real-world designations accumulated gradually around the 2 August 2025 deadline but were only reflected when the page was rewritten.

**Trend/rate:** +6 states over the ~13 months between the two published figures, an effective average of ~**0.45 states/month** — but this rate is an artifact of bulk updating rather than a smooth cadence. Meanwhile "Unclear" dropped from 14 to 6.

**Clear states (17 June 2026):** Cyprus, Denmark, Finland, Hungary, Ireland, Italy, Lithuania, Spain, plus a 9th (Malta or Slovenia — minor table-extraction ambiguity; the count of 9 is confirmed verbatim).

I've delivered the full report above and recorded structured findings (key facts, sources, and 9 data points) via the StructuredOutput tool.

sources.title: Overview of all AI Act National Implementation Plans (live, Last update 17 June 2026)
sources.snippet: 9 Member States have designated both market surveillance and notifying authorities ('clear'); 12 partial clarity; 6 unclear.

sources.snippet: three Member States have designated both notifying and market surveillance authorities ('clear'); ten partial clarity; 14 yet to designate.

sources.title: National Implementation Plans (Wayback, 16 June 2026 snapshot; still Last update 19 May 2025, 3 Clear)
sources.snippet: Still showing 'Last update: 19 May 2025' and 'three Member States ... clear' as of 16 June 2026.

sources.title: National Implementation Plans (Wayback, 29 April 2026 snapshot; 3 Clear)
sources.snippet: three Member States ... clear; ten partial clarity; 14 unclear (Last update 19 May 2025).

sources.title: Wayback Machine CDX index of snapshots (Aug 2025 - Jul 2026)
Article 70: Designation of national competent authorities
sources.snippet: Each Member State must appoint at least one notifying authority and one market surveillance authority; deadline 2 August 2025.
